texto: We parents are an extension of our children, not the other way around. We are their conscience until it becomes their responsibility to tell themselves what’s right and necessary. We are their butlers until they are fully able to get the items they need and can clean up after themselves. We are their cheerleaders until they learn how to develop their own confidence and motivation. We are their counselors until they are able to take the lead in making the tough decisions that affect them.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Larry Tanner sobre temas ligados a lideranca. A afirmação “We parents are an extension of our children, not the other way around. We are their conscience un…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a lideranca, parenting, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
